description_long: This grinder features a robust, industrial design with a large cylindrical grinding chamber mounted on a rectangular base. The front section includes a slanted control panel with a green display, possibly for operational controls or status indicators, and a recycling symbol suggesting eco-friendly operation. The cylindrical chamber is capped and has two metallic rods protruding from the top, likely for electrical or mechanical connections. The base is equipped with two sturdy side handles for portability and a visible power connection or exhaust port at the rear. The surfaces are a mix of matte and slightly glossy finishes, with the main body in dark metallic tones and the control panel in a lighter, textured material. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for heavy-duty urban or workshop use.
description: A heavy-duty, industrial grinder with a large cylindrical chamber, slanted control panel, and sturdy side handles, finished in dark metallic and textured materials.
description_view_0: Front view shows the slanted green control panel with operational symbols and the rectangular base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the cylindrical grinding chamber, side handle, and the angled control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the capped cylindrical chamber, metallic rods, and a rear port or connector.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the second handle, the full length of the chamber, and the control panel's side profile.
attribute_handle_design: Two horizontal handles are mounted on either side of the base, made of metal or hard plastic, with a simple straight design for easy lifting and carrying.
